scripts.dev:server: mkdir -p bin && mkdir -p apps/server/cmd/server/dist && touch apps/server/cmd/server/dist/.gitkeep && go build -o bin/dev-server apps/server/cmd/server/main.go && ./bin/dev-server
scripts.build: pnpm build:wasm && pnpm build:markdown-wasm && pnpm build:engine-core && pnpm build:core && pnpm build:web && pnpm build:server
scripts.build:wasm: cd packages/canvas-wasm && npx wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir dist
scripts.build:markdown-wasm: cd packages/markdown-wasm && npx wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir dist
scripts.build:server: mkdir -p apps/server/cmd/server/dist && touch apps/server/cmd/server/dist/.gitkeep && go build -o apps/server/bin/server apps/server/cmd/server/main.go
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter web run format:check 2>/dev/null || echo 'web: no format script'
scripts.test: pnpm --filter canvas-engine test && pnpm --filter web test
